command.choose_host.description: Open the host picker for the current co-op host save.
log.no_host_slot: No host save slot is currently available in the co-op menu.
log.open_coop_first: Open Co-op -> Host first, then use this command to test the picker.
log.open_picker_failed: Failed to open host picker. Using the game's default host flow.
menu.title: CHOOSE HOST
